data.title: Elon Musk's $260 Billion Empire Will Now Charge Helene Victims $400 For Internet – Are We Seeing Exploitation At Its Worst?
Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts Spotlight On 3 Materials Stocks Delivering High-Dividend Yields
Gene Sequencing Tech Provider 10x Genomics' Q3 Sales Fall Short On Expectations, But CEO Sees Opportunity Ahead
data.description: 10x Genomics reported Q3 2024 revenue of $151.7 million, down 1% from last year. Instruments revenue dropped 46%, while consumables grew 10%. CEO Serge Saxonov acknowledged the challenges faced but remains confident in future growth.

data.title: Top 3 Tech Stocks That Could Lead To Your Biggest Gains This Month
China Pledges $24B For Coal-to-Oil Infrastructure To Reduce Oil Imports
data.description: China's largest coal producer, CHN Energy, invests $24B in coal-to-petroleum facility to reduce reliance on imported oil and manage surplus production.
